dialog.stepLabel: Find all the kids to earn the “treasure”

items.speaker: Pippi
items.text: Yay! There goes Celo's winning streak at hide-and-seek!

items.speaker: Celo
items.text: Hey, why are you two so happy? We all got caught. We're supposed to be on the same side!

items.speaker: Jode
items.text: The game's over, so we're not on the same side anymore. Yay, Celo lost!

items.speaker: Celo
items.text: Fine. Since this {Male=mister;Female=lady} won, we should keep our promise.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Celo feels around in his pocket for a while before finally pulling out a mechanical part and hands it to you.

options.text: Is this some sort of Royan tradition?

items.speaker: Celo
items.text: That's the treasure. Only the three of us knew about it until today. Now, there's four.

items.speaker: Celo
items.text: This part is a little different from Exostrider parts, and there's some funny numbers on it. We thought it was special, so we kept it.

items.speaker: Celo
items.text: It has nothing to do with tradition. We found this while out exploring.

items.speaker: Celo
items.text: This part is a little different from Exostrider parts, and there's some funny numbers on it. We thought it was special, so we kept it.

items.speaker: Celo
items.text: What's wrong, {Male=mister;Female=lady}? You look kinda disappointed...

options.text: (I knew I shouldn't have had high hopes for this treasure.)

items.speaker: Celo
items.text: Don't be disappointed. What if this part is a clue to real treasure? Just look at those weird numbers on it.

items.speaker: Celo
items.text: I'm going to go think of a new hiding spot. If you ever want to play hide-and-seek again, {Male=mister;Female=lady}, come find us! Later!
